abstracts.abstract: This measure would designate April 28, 2026, as School Bus Drivers' Day in California, in order to draw special public attention to school bus drivers for their continued and excellent services to pupils in California.

subject: SchoolBusDrivers'Day
bill.title: Relative to School Bus Drivers' Day.

action.description: Enrolled and filed with the Secretary of State at 2 p.m.
